codeReview.summary: This is a verification-only feature with an empty commit (no file changes). The worker ran all 7 verification checks plus pytest and found zero issues. I independently re-ran all verification checks and confirmed: (1) schema.sql loads into in-memory SQLite without errors, (2) all 10 Python files in src/ parse correctly via ast.parse, (3) hooks/memory-hook.sh passes bash -n syntax validation, (4) distill.py stats shows 422 sessions and 507 facts across 6 categories, (5) distill.py patterns --help shows correct flags (--model, --min-projects, --promote), (6) inject.py --stdout --max-tokens 500 outputs valid memory context markdown, (7) FACT_CATEGORIES contains all 8 keys including 'error' and 'solution', (8) all 26 pytest tests pass in 2.28s.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The distill.py stats output shows 6 fact categories in the DB (context, decision, learning, pattern, preference, tool) but FACT_CATEGORIES defines 8 keys (adding error and solution). The stats command doesn't display categories with zero facts, which is correct behavior but worth noting — error and solution categories were added by a prior feature but no facts have been categorized under them yet.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: distill.py stats output shows only 6 categories; FACT_CATEGORIES keys include all 8: ['context', 'decision', 'error', 'learning', 'pattern', 'preference', 'solution', 'tool']

summary: All verification checks pass. The commit is intentionally empty since no code fixes were needed — this was a pure verification feature. I independently confirmed all 7 checks plus pytest (26/26 tests pass). The codebase is in a healthy state with valid schema, parseable Python, valid bash hook, working CLI commands, and complete FACT_CATEGORIES including error and solution.
